popup.hintTop: Recommended: use the bar at the bottom-right of the video page (Start / End). The popup closes when you click the video.
popup.streamsHint: On .php pages: use Cut on a stream. On YouTube and similar sites, Queue uses the page URL (like MeTube).
popup.hintFooter: Clips from the extension — downloads go to your PC via the Clip-Direct web UI by default.
popup.status.webUiOpened: Web UI opened — progress and PC download there.
popup.status.reloadExtension: Extension was updated — reload this page (F5).
popup.status.current: Now: {time} — or use the on-page bar
popup.status.pending: Start saved — set End on the page bar or here
popup.status.startFailed: Start failed — use the bar at bottom-right on the page
popup.status.sent: Sent — see progress/download in the web UI.
popup.status.barShown: Bar should be visible on the page
popup.stream.cutOneTitle: One marked range as a file
popup.stream.mergeTitle: Merge all marked ranges into one file
popup.stream.fullTitle: Download entire stream without cut markers
popup.referer.label: Referer: {origin}
options.title: Clip-Direct Extension settings
options.noteDefault: Default: finished files are saved to your PC via the Clip-Direct web UI (browser download).
options.serverNote: Same URL for jobs and the web UI — e.g. http://localhost:8090/ — use the Web-UI button in the popup.
options.openUiAfterQueue: Open web UI after queue (single tab)
bar.status.pending: Start {start} — seek to end, then End
bar.reloadHint: Clip-Direct extension was updated — reload this page (F5)
error.shellPagePhp: This page (.php) can only be downloaded via a detected stream. Play the video, reload (F5), then use Cut on a stream — or check Detected streams in the popup.
error.hlsSegmentOnly: Only an HLS segment was detected, not the playlist. Play the video briefly, reload (F5), then use Cut on the m3u8 stream in the popup.
ui.subtitle: Clips from the extension — when Ready, auto-save (checkbox) or Save to PC.
ui.tabWarn: Multiple tabs with this page open cause duplicate save dialogs. Close the other tabs.
ui.empty: No jobs yet. Send a clip from the extension.
ui.autoSave: When Ready, open save dialog automatically (once per clip)
ui.autoSaveHint: Keep only one tab on this page open. Auto-save runs only in the visible tab.
